Water-Use Efficiency and Rice Productivity under Reduced Irrigation in Tropical Arid Conditions

1 Project Setup

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.dates as mdates
import seaborn as sns
import ptitprince as pt 
from statsmodels.stats.multicomp import pairwise_tukeyhsd
from matplotlib.patches import Patch
import statsmodels.api as sm
from statsmodels.formula.api import ols
from statsmodels.stats.anova import anova_lm
from itertools import combinations
from scipy.stats import zscore

2 Import data

# ID general del Google Sheet
sheet_id = "10e-foXp3XlmSt3xHje4MmSKIYnUGZHgLvbtC3p9HPd8"

# Nombre de pestaña -> gid
tabs = {
    "morfo": "903992789",
    "rdt": "574345748",
    "calidad": "1946582062",
    "clima": "946659552"
}

# Diccionario para guardar DataFrames
dfs = {}

# Leer cada pestaña
for nombre, gid in tabs.items():

    url = (
        f"https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/"
        f"{sheet_id}/export?format=csv&gid={gid}"
    )

    dfs[nombre] = pd.read_csv(url)

# Acceder a cada DataFrame
morfo = dfs["morfo"]
rdt = dfs["rdt"]
calidad = dfs["calidad"]
clima = dfs["clima"]

3 Meteorological data

# ======================================================
# FECHA
# ======================================================

clima["Fecha"] = pd.to_datetime(clima["Fecha"])

# ======================================================
# LOCALIDADES
# ======================================================

localidades = clima["Localidad"].unique()

# ======================================================
# LETRAS PANELES
# ======================================================

letters = ["a", "b", "c"]

# ======================================================
# FIGURA
# ======================================================

fig, axes = plt.subplots(
    nrows=len(localidades),
    ncols=1,
    figsize=(10, 10),
    sharex=True
)

# Si solo hay una localidad
if len(localidades) == 1:
    axes = [axes]

# ======================================================
# GUARDAR LEYENDA
# ======================================================

legend_handles = []
legend_labels = []

# ======================================================
# LOOP LOCALIDADES
# ======================================================

for i, loc in enumerate(localidades):

    ax = axes[i]

    # ==================================================
    # DATOS
    # ==================================================

    df = clima[
        clima["Localidad"] == loc
    ].copy()

    # ==================================================
    # LINEAS CLIMATICAS
    # ==================================================

    line1, = ax.plot(
        df["Fecha"],
        df["HR"]/3,
        linestyle="--",
        color="skyblue",
        linewidth=2,
        label="HR (%)"
    )

    line2, = ax.plot(
        df["Fecha"],
        df["Tmax"],
        linestyle="--",
        color="red",
        linewidth=2,
        label="Tmax (°C)"
    )

    line3, = ax.plot(
        df["Fecha"],
        df["Tmin"],
        linestyle=":",
        color="blue",
        linewidth=2,
        label="Tmin (°C)"
    )

    # ==================================================
    # PRECIPITACION
    # ==================================================

    ax2 = ax.twinx()

    ax2.bar(
        df["Fecha"],
        df["PP"]/3,
        width=5,
        color="cornflowerblue",
        edgecolor="black",
        alpha=0.7
    )

    # ==================================================
    # GUARDAR LEYENDA SOLO UNA VEZ
    # ==================================================

    if i == 0:

        legend_handles = [line1, line2, line3]

        legend_labels = [
            "HR (%)",
            "Tmax (°C)",
            "Tmin (°C)"
        ]

    # ==================================================
    # ETIQUETAS
    # ==================================================

    ax.set_ylabel("Temperature (°C)")

    ax2.set_ylabel("Precipitation (mm)")

    # mover label eje derecho
    ax2.yaxis.set_label_coords(1.04, 0.5)

    # separar ticks eje derecho
    ax2.tick_params(
        axis='y',
        pad=2
    )

    # ==================================================
    # LIMITES
    # ==================================================

    ax.set_ylim(0, 50)

    ax2.set_ylim(0, 100)

    # ==================================================
    # GRID
    # ==================================================

    ax.grid(
        True,
        linestyle="-",
        alpha=0.5
    )

    # ==================================================
    # LETRAS PANELES
    # ==================================================

    ax.text(
        0.01,
        0.95,
        letters[i],
        transform=ax.transAxes,
        fontsize=18,
        fontweight="bold",
        ha="left",
        va="top"
    )

    # ==================================================
    # OCULTAR EJE X SUPERIOR
    # ==================================================

    if i < len(localidades) - 1:

        ax.tick_params(
            axis='x',
            labelbottom=False
        )

# ======================================================
# FORMATO FECHAS
# ======================================================

axes[-1].xaxis.set_major_formatter(
    mdates.DateFormatter('%b')
)

plt.xticks(rotation=45)

# ======================================================
# LEYENDA GLOBAL
# ======================================================

fig.legend(
    legend_handles,
    legend_labels,
    loc="upper center",
    ncol=3,
    frameon=False,
    fontsize=12,
    bbox_to_anchor=(0.5,1.02)
)

# ======================================================
# AJUSTES
# ======================================================

plt.subplots_adjust(
    top=0.97,
    hspace=0.07,
    right=0.92
)

# ======================================================
# GUARDAR FIGURA
# ======================================================

plt.savefig(
    "submission/figure_2.jpg",
    dpi=600,
    bbox_inches="tight"
)

# ======================================================
# MOSTRAR
# ======================================================

plt.show()

4 Objetives

4.1 General objective: To evaluate the effect of different irrigation water volumes on the morphology, yield, and grain quality of rice in northern Peru.

# NOMBRES DE VARIABLES PARA TABLAS Y FIGURAS
# =====================================================

variable_labels = {

    # Yield
    "rendimiento_t_ha": "Grain yield (t ha⁻¹)",
    "eficiencia_agua_kg_m3": "Water-use efficiency (kg m⁻³)",

    # Agronomic traits
    "altura_cm": "Plant height (cm)",
    "ancho_grano_mm": "Grain width (mm)",
    "longitud_grano_mm": "Grain length (mm)",
    "n_macollos_golpe": "Number of tillers per hill",
    "longitud_panoja_cm": "Panicle length (cm)",
    "n_panojas_m2": "Panicles m⁻²",

    # Grain quality
    "granos_enteros": "Head rice (%)",
    "granos_quebrados": "Broken rice (%)",
    "granos_centro_blanco": "Chalky grains (%)",
    "n_granos_vano": "Number of unfilled grains per panicle",
    "n_granos_negro": "Number of black grains per panicle",
    "n_granos_lleno": "Number of filled grains per panicle"
}

# =====================================================
# VARIABLES POR DATASET
# =====================================================

datasets = {

    "Yield and water-use efficiency": {
        "data": rdt,
        "variables": [
            "rendimiento_t_ha",
            "eficiencia_agua_kg_m3"
        ]
    },

    "Agronomic traits": {
        "data": morfo,
        "variables": [
            "altura_cm",
            "ancho_grano_mm",
            "longitud_grano_mm",
            "n_macollos_golpe",
            "longitud_panoja_cm",
            "n_panojas_m2"
        ]
    },
    
    "Grain quality traits": {
        "data": calidad,
        "variables": [
            "granos_enteros",
            "granos_quebrados",
            "granos_centro_blanco",
            "n_granos_vano",
            "n_granos_negro",
            "n_granos_lleno"
        ]
    }

}

# =====================================================
# FUNCIONES AUXILIARES
# =====================================================

def stars(p):

    if pd.isna(p):
        return ""

    elif p < 0.001:
        return " (***)"

    elif p < 0.01:
        return " (**)"

    elif p < 0.05:
        return " (*)"

    else:
        return " (ns)"


def format_ms(ms, p):

    if pd.isna(ms):
        return ""

    if ms >= 1:
        txt = f"{ms:.2f}"
    else:
        txt = f"{ms:.4f}"

    return txt + stars(p)


# =====================================================
# TABLA ANOVA
# =====================================================

resultados = []

# =====================================================
# LOOP PRINCIPAL
# =====================================================

for grupo, info in datasets.items():

    df = info["data"].copy()

    # Convertir rendimiento a toneladas por hectárea
    if "rendimiento_kg_ha" in df.columns:
        df["rendimiento_t_ha"] = df["rendimiento_kg_ha"] / 1000

    variables = info["variables"]

    # Factores
    df["Tratamiento"] = df["Tratamiento"].astype("category")
    df["Localidad"] = df["Localidad"].astype("category")
    df["Bloque"] = df["Bloque"].astype("category")

    for var in variables:

        print(f"Analizando: {var}")

        data = df[
            ["Tratamiento", "Localidad", "Bloque", var]
        ].dropna()

        formula = (
            f"Q('{var}') ~ "
            f"C(Tratamiento) * C(Localidad) + "
            f"C(Localidad):C(Bloque)"
        )

        model = ols(
            formula,
            data=data
        ).fit()

        anova = anova_lm(
            model,
            typ=2
        )

        term_trat = "C(Tratamiento)"
        term_loc = "C(Localidad)"
        term_inter = "C(Tratamiento):C(Localidad)"
        term_bloque = "C(Localidad):C(Bloque)"
        term_resid = "Residual"

        ms_trat = (
            anova.loc[term_trat, "sum_sq"] /
            anova.loc[term_trat, "df"]
        )

        ms_loc = (
            anova.loc[term_loc, "sum_sq"] /
            anova.loc[term_loc, "df"]
        )

        ms_inter = (
            anova.loc[term_inter, "sum_sq"] /
            anova.loc[term_inter, "df"]
        )

        ms_bloque = (
            anova.loc[term_bloque, "sum_sq"] /
            anova.loc[term_bloque, "df"]
        )

        ms_resid = (
            anova.loc[term_resid, "sum_sq"] /
            anova.loc[term_resid, "df"]
        )

        resultados.append({

            "Group": grupo,

            "Trait": variable_labels[var],

            "Treatment (T)": format_ms(
                ms_trat,
                anova.loc[term_trat, "PR(>F)"]
            ),

            "Location (L)": format_ms(
                ms_loc,
                anova.loc[term_loc, "PR(>F)"]
            ),

            "T × L": format_ms(
                ms_inter,
                anova.loc[term_inter, "PR(>F)"]
            ),

            "Block (Location)": format_ms(
                ms_bloque,
                anova.loc[term_bloque, "PR(>F)"]
            ),

            "Residual": format_ms(
                ms_resid,
                np.nan
            )

        })

# =====================================================
# TABLA FINAL
# =====================================================

tabla_anova = pd.DataFrame(resultados)

# Mostrar
display(tabla_anova)

Analizando: eficiencia_agua_kg_m3

Analizando: ancho_grano_mm

4.2 Specific Objective 1

# ======================================================
# COPIA DEL DATAFRAME
# ======================================================

rdt2 = rdt.copy()

# Convertir rendimiento de kg ha-1 a t ha-1
rdt2["rendimiento_t_ha"] = rdt2["rendimiento_kg_ha"] / 1000


# ======================================================
# VARIABLES
# ======================================================

variables = {

    "rendimiento_t_ha": "Grain yield (t ha⁻¹)",

    "eficiencia_agua_kg_m3": "Water-use efficiency (kg m⁻³)"
}


# ======================================================
# FUNCION LETRAS TUKEY
# ======================================================

def tukey_letters(df, var):

    summary = (
        df.groupby("Tratamiento")[var]
        .agg(mean="mean")
        .reset_index()
    )

    tukey = pairwise_tukeyhsd(
        endog=df[var],
        groups=df["Tratamiento"],
        alpha=0.05
    )

    tukey_df = pd.DataFrame(
        data=tukey._results_table.data[1:],
        columns=tukey._results_table.data[0]
    )

    groups = list(summary["Tratamiento"])

    means = dict(
        zip(summary["Tratamiento"], summary["mean"])
    )

    groups_sorted = sorted(
        groups,
        key=lambda g: means[g],
        reverse=True
    )

    sig = pd.DataFrame(
        False,
        index=groups,
        columns=groups
    )

    for _, row in tukey_df.iterrows():

        g1 = row["group1"]
        g2 = row["group2"]

        sig.loc[g1, g2] = row["reject"]
        sig.loc[g2, g1] = row["reject"]

    letters_dict = {g: "" for g in groups}

    alphabet = list("abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz")

    for letter in alphabet:

        assigned = []

        for g in groups_sorted:

            if letters_dict[g] == "":

                compatible = True

                for a in assigned:

                    if sig.loc[g, a]:
                        compatible = False
                        break

                if compatible:
                    assigned.append(g)

        if not assigned:
            continue

        for g in assigned:
            letters_dict[g] += letter

        if all(letters_dict[g] != "" for g in groups):
            break

    return letters_dict


# ======================================================
# TABLA FINAL
# ======================================================

tabla_final = pd.DataFrame()

tabla_final["Treatment"] = sorted(
    rdt2["Tratamiento"].unique()
)


# ======================================================
# LOOP VARIABLES
# ======================================================

for var, label in variables.items():

    summary = (
        rdt2
        .groupby("Tratamiento")[var]
        .agg(mean="mean", sd="std")
        .reset_index()
    )

    letters_dict = tukey_letters(rdt2, var)

    summary[label] = (
        summary["mean"].round(2).astype(str)
        + " ± "
        + summary["sd"].round(2).astype(str)
        + " "
        + summary["Tratamiento"].map(letters_dict)
    )

    tabla_final[label] = summary[label]


# ======================================================
# MOSTRAR TABLA
# ======================================================

display(tabla_final)
Treatment Grain yield (t ha⁻¹) Water-use efficiency (kg m⁻³)
0 T0 11.67 ± 1.09 a 0.69 ± 0.06 b
1 T1 11.19 ± 1.53 a 0.75 ± 0.1 b
2 T2 11.81 ± 1.58 a 0.84 ± 0.11 a
3 T3 11.3 ± 1.59 a 0.87 ± 0.12 a

4.3 Specific Objective 2

# ======================================================
# CONFIGURACION GENERAL
# ======================================================

sns.set_theme(
    style="whitegrid",
    context="paper"
)

palette_dict = {
    "T0": "#66c2a5",
    "T1": "#fc8d62",
    "T2": "#8da0cb",
    "T3": "#e78ac3"
}

# ======================================================
# VARIABLES
# ======================================================

variables = [
    "altura_cm",
    "n_macollos_golpe",
    "longitud_panoja_cm",
    "n_panojas_m2",
    "longitud_grano_mm",
    "ancho_grano_mm"
]

ylabels = [
    "Plant height (cm)",
    "Number of tillers per hill",
    "Panicle length (cm)",
    "Number of panicles per m²",
    "Grain length (mm)",
    "Grain width (mm)"
]

ylims = [
    (75,110),
    (20,45),
    (21,25),
    (20,45),
    (8,11),
    (2.1,2.7)
]

letters_panel = ["a","b","c","d","e","f"]

# ======================================================
# FUNCION PARA LETRAS DE TUKEY
# ======================================================

def tukey_letters(data, var):

    summary = data.groupby("Tratamiento")[var].agg(
        mean="mean"
    ).reset_index()

    tukey = pairwise_tukeyhsd(
        endog=data[var],
        groups=data["Tratamiento"],
        alpha=0.05
    )

    tukey_df = pd.DataFrame(
        data=tukey._results_table.data[1:],
        columns=tukey._results_table.data[0]
    )

    groups = list(summary["Tratamiento"])

    means = dict(
        zip(summary["Tratamiento"], summary["mean"])
    )

    groups_sorted = sorted(
        groups,
        key=lambda g: means[g],
        reverse=True
    )

    sig = pd.DataFrame(
        False,
        index=groups,
        columns=groups
    )

    for _, row in tukey_df.iterrows():

        g1 = row["group1"]
        g2 = row["group2"]

        sig.loc[g1, g2] = row["reject"]
        sig.loc[g2, g1] = row["reject"]

    letters_dict = {g: "" for g in groups}

    alphabet = list("abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz")

    for letter in alphabet:

        assigned = []

        for g in groups_sorted:

            if letters_dict[g] == "":

                compatible = True

                for a in assigned:

                    if sig.loc[g, a]:
                        compatible = False
                        break

                if compatible:
                    assigned.append(g)

        if not assigned:
            continue

        for g in assigned:
            letters_dict[g] += letter

        if all(letters_dict[g] != "" for g in groups):
            break

    return letters_dict

# ======================================================
# FIGURA PRINCIPAL
# ======================================================

fig, axes = plt.subplots(
    3,
    2,
    figsize=(12,11),
    sharex=True
)

axes = axes.flatten()

anova_results = {}

# ======================================================
# LOOP PRINCIPAL
# ======================================================

for i, var in enumerate(variables):

    ax = axes[i]

    # ==================================================
    # ANOVA
    # ==================================================

    modelo = ols(
        f"{var} ~ C(Localidad) + C(Localidad):C(Bloque) + C(Tratamiento)",
        data=morfo
    ).fit()

    anova_table = sm.stats.anova_lm(
        modelo,
        typ=2
    )

    anova_results[var] = anova_table

    # ==================================================
    # SUMMARY
    # ==================================================

    summary = morfo.groupby("Tratamiento")[var].agg(
        mean="mean",
        sem="sem"
    ).reset_index()

    order = summary["Tratamiento"].tolist()

    # ==================================================
    # LETRAS TUKEY
    # ==================================================

    letters_dict = tukey_letters(morfo, var)

    # ==================================================
    # RAINCLOUD PLOT
    # ==================================================

    pt.RainCloud(
        data=morfo,
        x="Tratamiento",
        y=var,
        order=order,
        hue="Tratamiento",
        palette=palette_dict,

        width_viol=0.55,
        width_box=0.14,
        move=0.18,

        dodge=False,

        alpha=0.60,
        point_size=2,

        orient="v",

        ax=ax
)

    # ==================================================
    # BOXPLOT
    # ==================================================

    sns.boxplot(
        data=morfo,
        x="Tratamiento",
        y=var,
        order=order,

        width=0.14,

        showcaps=False,
        showfliers=False,
        legend=False,

        boxprops=dict(
            facecolor="white",
            edgecolor="black",
            linewidth=1.2,
            zorder=5
        ),

        whiskerprops=dict(
            color="black",
            linewidth=1.2
        ),

        medianprops=dict(
            color="black",
            linewidth=2.2
        ),

        ax=ax
)


    # ==================================================
    # PUNTOS
    # ==================================================

    sns.stripplot(
        data=morfo,
        x="Tratamiento",
        y=var,
        order=order,

        hue="Tratamiento",
        palette=palette_dict,

        dodge=False,

        jitter=0.18,

        size=2.4,

        alpha=0.70,

        edgecolor="black",
        linewidth=0.25,

        legend=False,

        zorder=6,

        ax=ax
)

    # --------------------------------------------------
    # Asegurar que la caja quede sobre el raincloud
    # --------------------------------------------------

    for artist in ax.artists:
        artist.set_zorder(7)

    for line in ax.lines:
        line.set_zorder(8)
    # ==================================================
    # AGREGAR LETRAS TUKEY
    # ==================================================

    offset = morfo[var].std() * 0.15

    for j, trat in enumerate(order):

        y_max = morfo.loc[
            morfo["Tratamiento"] == trat,
            var
        ].max()

        ax.text(
            j,
            y_max + offset,
            letters_dict[trat],
            ha="center",
            va="bottom",
            fontsize=10,
            fontweight="bold"
        )

    # ==================================================
    # ESTETICA
    # ==================================================

    ax.set_ylabel(ylabels[i])

    ax.set_ylim(ylims[i])

    ax.grid(
        True,
        axis="y",
        linestyle="-",
        alpha=0.7
    )

    sns.despine(
        left=False,
        bottom=False,
        ax=ax
    )

    # Letras panel
    ax.text(
        0.02,
        0.97,
        letters_panel[i],
        transform=ax.transAxes,
        fontsize=16,
        fontweight="bold",
        va="top"
    )

    # ==================================================
    # OCULTAR EJE X SUPERIOR
    # ==================================================

    if i < 4:

        ax.set_xlabel("")

        ax.tick_params(
            axis='x',
            bottom=False,
            labelbottom=False
        )

    else:
        ax.set_xlabel("Treatment")

# ======================================================
# LEYENDA GLOBAL
# ======================================================

legend_labels = [
    "T0: 17 000 m³ ha$^{-1}$",
    "T1: 15 000 m³ ha$^{-1}$",
    "T2: 14 000 m³ ha$^{-1}$",
    "T3: 13 000 m³ ha$^{-1}$"
]

handles = [
    plt.Rectangle((0,0),1,1,color=palette_dict[t])
    for t in ["T0", "T1", "T2", "T3"]
]

fig.legend(
    handles,
    legend_labels,
    loc="upper center",
    ncol=4,                    # una sola fila
    fontsize=10,
    frameon=True,
    bbox_to_anchor=(0.5,1.03)
)

# ======================================================
# AJUSTAR ESPACIADO
# ======================================================

plt.subplots_adjust(
    top=0.98,
    hspace=0.065,
    wspace=0.135
)

# ======================================================
# MOSTRAR
# ======================================================

plt.savefig(
    "submission/figure_3.jpg",
    dpi=300,
    bbox_inches="tight"
)


plt.show()

4.4 Specific Objective 3

# ======================================================
# CONFIGURACION GENERAL
# ======================================================

sns.set_theme(
    style="whitegrid",
    context="paper"
)

palette_dict = {
    "T0": "#66c2a5",
    "T1": "#fc8d62",
    "T2": "#8da0cb",
    "T3": "#e78ac3"
}

# ======================================================
# VARIABLES
# ======================================================

variables = [
    "granos_enteros",
    "granos_quebrados",
    "granos_centro_blanco",
    "n_granos_vano",
    "n_granos_negro",
    "n_granos_lleno"
]

ylabels = [
    "Head rice (%)",
    "Broken rice (%)",
    "Chalky grains (%)",
    "Number of unfilled grains per panicle",
    "Number of black grains per panicle",
    "Number of filled grains per panicle"
]

ylims = [
    (35,75),
    (0,35),
    (0,40),
    (0,40),
    (0,18),
    (80,200)
]

letters_panel = ["a","b","c","d","e","f"]

# ======================================================
# FUNCION PARA LETRAS DE TUKEY
# ======================================================

def tukey_letters(calidad, var):

    summary = calidad.groupby("Tratamiento")[var].agg(
        mean="mean"
    ).reset_index()

    tukey = pairwise_tukeyhsd(
        endog=calidad[var],
        groups=calidad["Tratamiento"],
        alpha=0.05
    )

    tukey_df = pd.DataFrame(
        data=tukey._results_table.data[1:],
        columns=tukey._results_table.data[0]
    )

    groups = list(summary["Tratamiento"])

    means = dict(
        zip(summary["Tratamiento"], summary["mean"])
    )

    groups_sorted = sorted(
        groups,
        key=lambda g: means[g],
        reverse=True
    )

    sig = pd.DataFrame(
        False,
        index=groups,
        columns=groups
    )

    for _, row in tukey_df.iterrows():

        g1 = row["group1"]
        g2 = row["group2"]

        sig.loc[g1, g2] = row["reject"]
        sig.loc[g2, g1] = row["reject"]

    letters_dict = {g: "" for g in groups}

    alphabet = list("abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz")

    for letter in alphabet:

        assigned = []

        for g in groups_sorted:

            if letters_dict[g] == "":

                compatible = True

                for a in assigned:

                    if sig.loc[g, a]:
                        compatible = False
                        break

                if compatible:
                    assigned.append(g)

        if not assigned:
            continue

        for g in assigned:
            letters_dict[g] += letter

        if all(letters_dict[g] != "" for g in groups):
            break

    return letters_dict

# ======================================================
# FIGURA PRINCIPAL
# ======================================================

fig, axes = plt.subplots(
    3,
    2,
    figsize=(12,11),
    sharex=True
)

axes = axes.flatten()

anova_results = {}

# ======================================================
# LOOP PRINCIPAL
# ======================================================

for i, var in enumerate(variables):

    ax = axes[i]

    # ==================================================
    # ANOVA
    # ==================================================

    modelo = ols(
        f"{var} ~ C(Localidad) + C(Localidad):C(Bloque) + C(Tratamiento)",
        data=calidad
    ).fit()

    anova_table = sm.stats.anova_lm(
        modelo,
        typ=2
    )

    anova_results[var] = anova_table

    # ==================================================
    # SUMMARY
    # ==================================================

    summary = calidad.groupby("Tratamiento")[var].agg(
        mean="mean",
        sem="sem"
    ).reset_index()

    order = summary["Tratamiento"].tolist()

    # ==================================================
    # LETRAS TUKEY
    # ==================================================

    letters_dict = tukey_letters(calidad, var)

# ==================================================
    # RAINCLOUD PLOT
    # ==================================================

    pt.RainCloud(
        data=calidad,
        x="Tratamiento",
        y=var,
        order=order,
        hue="Tratamiento",
        palette=palette_dict,

        width_viol=0.55,
        width_box=0.14,
        move=0.18,

        dodge=False,

        alpha=0.60,
        point_size=2,

        orient="v",

        ax=ax
)

    # ==================================================
    # BOXPLOT
    # ==================================================

    sns.boxplot(
        data=calidad,
        x="Tratamiento",
        y=var,
        order=order,

        width=0.14,

        showcaps=False,
        showfliers=False,
        legend=False,

        boxprops=dict(
            facecolor="white",
            edgecolor="black",
            linewidth=1.2,
            zorder=5
        ),

        whiskerprops=dict(
            color="black",
            linewidth=1.2
        ),

        medianprops=dict(
            color="black",
            linewidth=2.2
        ),

        ax=ax
)


    # ==================================================
    # PUNTOS
    # ==================================================

    sns.stripplot(
        data=calidad,
        x="Tratamiento",
        y=var,
        order=order,

        hue="Tratamiento",
        palette=palette_dict,

        dodge=False,

        jitter=0.18,

        size=2.4,

        alpha=0.70,

        edgecolor="black",
        linewidth=0.25,

        legend=False,

        zorder=6,

        ax=ax
)

    # --------------------------------------------------
    # Asegurar que la caja quede sobre el raincloud
    # --------------------------------------------------

    for artist in ax.artists:
        artist.set_zorder(7)

    for line in ax.lines:
        line.set_zorder(8)

    # ==================================================
    # AGREGAR LETRAS TUKEY
    # ==================================================

    offset = calidad[var].std() * 0.15

    for j, trat in enumerate(order):

        y_max = calidad.loc[
            calidad["Tratamiento"] == trat,
            var
        ].max()

        ax.text(
            j,
            y_max + offset,
            letters_dict[trat],
            ha="center",
            va="bottom",
            fontsize=10,
            fontweight="bold"
        )

    # ==================================================
    # ESTETICA
    # ==================================================

    ax.set_ylabel(ylabels[i])

    ax.set_ylim(ylims[i])

    ax.grid(
        True,
        axis="y",
        linestyle="-",
        alpha=0.7
    )

    sns.despine(
        left=False,
        bottom=False,
        ax=ax
    )

    # Letras panel
    ax.text(
        0.02,
        0.97,
        letters_panel[i],
        transform=ax.transAxes,
        fontsize=16,
        fontweight="bold",
        va="top"
    )

    # ==================================================
    # OCULTAR EJE X SUPERIOR
    # ==================================================

    if i < 4:

        ax.set_xlabel("")

        ax.tick_params(
            axis='x',
            bottom=False,
            labelbottom=False
        )

    else:
        ax.set_xlabel("Treatment")

# ======================================================
# LEYENDA GLOBAL
# ======================================================

legend_labels = [
    "T0: 17 000 m³ ha$^{-1}$",
    "T1: 15 000 m³ ha$^{-1}$",
    "T2: 14 000 m³ ha$^{-1}$",
    "T3: 13 000 m³ ha$^{-1}$"
]

handles = [
    plt.Rectangle((0,0),1,1,color=palette_dict[t])
    for t in ["T0", "T1", "T2", "T3"]
]

fig.legend(
    handles,
    legend_labels,
    loc="upper center",
    ncol=4,                    # una sola fila
    fontsize=10,
    frameon=True,
    bbox_to_anchor=(0.5,1.03)
)

# ======================================================
# AJUSTAR ESPACIADO
# ======================================================

plt.subplots_adjust(
    top=0.98,
    hspace=0.065,
    wspace=0.135
)

# ======================================================
# MOSTRAR
# ======================================================

plt.savefig(
    "submission/figure_4.jpg",
    dpi=300,
    bbox_inches="tight"
)

plt.show()

4.5 Multivariate analysis

# =====================================================
# 1. UNIR BASES
# =====================================================

df = (
    rdt.merge(
        calidad,
        on=["Tratamiento", "Localidad", "Bloque"],
        how="inner"
    )
    .merge(
        morfo,
        on=["Tratamiento", "Localidad", "Bloque"],
        how="inner"
    )
)

# =====================================================
# 3. VARIABLES
# =====================================================

variables = [

    # Rendimiento
    "rendimiento_kg_ha",
    "eficiencia_agua_kg_m3",

    # Calidad
    "granos_enteros",
    "granos_quebrados",
    "granos_centro_blanco",
    "n_granos_vano",
    "n_granos_negro",
    "n_granos_lleno",

    # Morfometría
    "altura_cm",
    "ancho_grano_mm",
    "longitud_grano_mm",
    "n_macollos_golpe",
    "longitud_panoja_cm",
    "n_panojas_m2"
]

# =====================================================
# 4. VERIFICAR VARIABLES EXISTENTES
# =====================================================

variables = [
    v for v in variables
    if v in df.columns
]

print("Variables usadas:")
print(variables)

# =====================================================
# 5. NOMBRES EN INGLÉS
# =====================================================

variable_names_en = {

    "rendimiento_kg_ha":
        "Grain yield (kg ha$^{-1}$)",

    "eficiencia_agua_kg_m3":
        "Water use efficiency (kg m$^{-3}$)",

    "granos_enteros":
        "Head rice (%)",

    "granos_quebrados":
        "Broken rice (%)",

    "granos_centro_blanco":
        "Chalky grains (%)",

    "n_granos_vano":
        "Unfilled grains",

    "n_granos_negro":
        "Black grains",

    "n_granos_lleno":
        "Filled grains",

    "altura_cm":
        "Plant height (cm)",

    "ancho_grano_mm":
        "Grain width (mm)",

    "longitud_grano_mm":
        "Grain length (mm)",

    "n_macollos_golpe":
        "Tillers per hill",

    "longitud_panoja_cm":
        "Panicle length (cm)",

    "n_panojas_m2":
        "Panicles per m²"
}

# =====================================================
# 6. MEDIA POR TRATAMIENTO
# =====================================================

tabla_medias = (
    df.groupby("Tratamiento")[variables]
    .mean()
)

# =====================================================
# 7. Z-SCORE
# =====================================================

tabla_z = tabla_medias.apply(
    zscore,
    axis=0
)

# Filas = variables
# Columnas = tratamientos

tabla_z_plot = tabla_z.T

# =====================================================
# 8. RENOMBRAR VARIABLES
# =====================================================

tabla_z_plot = tabla_z_plot.rename(
    index=variable_names_en
)

# =====================================================
# 9. HEATMAP
# =====================================================

sns.set_theme(
    style="white",
    context="paper"
)

g = sns.clustermap(
    tabla_z_plot,
    cmap="RdYlBu",
    center=0,
    linewidths=0.6,
    linecolor="white",
    figsize=(10,9),
    method="ward",
    metric="euclidean",
    row_cluster=True,
    col_cluster=True,
    annot=True,
    fmt=".2f",
    annot_kws={
        "size":8,
        "color":"black"
    },
    cbar_kws={
        "label":"Z-score"
    }
)

# =====================================================
# 10. ETIQUETAS
# =====================================================

g.ax_heatmap.set_xlabel(
    "Treatment",
    fontsize=11,
    fontweight="bold"
)

g.ax_heatmap.set_ylabel(
    "Traits",
    fontsize=11,
    fontweight="bold"
)

g.ax_heatmap.tick_params(
    axis="x",
    labelsize=10
)

g.ax_heatmap.tick_params(
    axis="y",
    labelsize=9
)

plt.setp(
    g.ax_heatmap.get_xticklabels(),
    rotation=0
)

plt.setp(
    g.ax_heatmap.get_yticklabels(),
    rotation=0
)

# =====================================================
# 11. TITULO
# =====================================================

g.fig.suptitle(
    "Relationship between irrigation treatments and rice traits",
    y=1.02,
    fontsize=14,
    fontweight="bold"
)

# =====================================================
# 12. GUARDAR
# =====================================================

plt.savefig(
    "submission/figure_5.jpg",
    dpi=600,
    bbox_inches="tight"
)

plt.show()
Variables usadas:
['rendimiento_kg_ha', 'eficiencia_agua_kg_m3', 'granos_enteros', 'granos_quebrados', 'granos_centro_blanco', 'n_granos_vano', 'n_granos_negro', 'n_granos_lleno', 'altura_cm', 'ancho_grano_mm', 'longitud_grano_mm', 'n_macollos_golpe', 'longitud_panoja_cm', 'n_panojas_m2']

4.6 Supplementary material

# =====================================================
# UNIR DATASETS
# =====================================================

df = (
    rdt.merge(
        calidad,
        on=["Tratamiento", "Localidad", "Bloque"],
        how="inner"
    )
    .merge(
        morfo,
        on=["Tratamiento", "Localidad", "Bloque"],
        how="inner"
    )
)

df["Localidad"] = df["Localidad"].replace({
    "PAITA": "Viviate",
    "IGNACIO ESCUDERO": "Ignacio Escudero",
    "EEA El Chira": "E.E.A. El Chira"
})

# =====================================================
# CONVERTIR RENDIMIENTO A t ha⁻¹
# =====================================================

df["rendimiento_t_ha"] = df["rendimiento_kg_ha"] / 1000

# =====================================================
# VARIABLES
# =====================================================

variables = [

    # Yield
    "rendimiento_t_ha",
    "eficiencia_agua_kg_m3",

    # Agronomic traits
    "altura_cm",
    "ancho_grano_mm",
    "longitud_grano_mm",
    "n_macollos_golpe",
    "longitud_panoja_cm",
    "n_panojas_m2",

    # Milling quality
    "granos_enteros",
    "granos_quebrados",
    "granos_centro_blanco",
    "n_granos_vano",
    "n_granos_negro",
    "n_granos_lleno",

]

# =====================================================
# VERIFICAR VARIABLES EXISTENTES
# =====================================================

variables = [
    v for v in variables
    if v in df.columns
]

# =====================================================
# NOMBRES EN INGLÉS
# =====================================================

rename_vars = {

    # Yield and water-use efficiency
    "rendimiento_t_ha":
        "Grain yield (t ha⁻¹)",

    "eficiencia_agua_kg_m3":
        "Water-use efficiency (kg m⁻³)",

    # Agronomic traits
    "altura_cm":
        "Plant height (cm)",

    "ancho_grano_mm":
        "Grain width (mm)",

    "longitud_grano_mm":
        "Grain length (mm)",

    "n_macollos_golpe":
        "Number of tillers per hill",

    "longitud_panoja_cm":
        "Panicle length (cm)",

    "n_panojas_m2":
        "Number of panicles per m²",

    # Grain quality traits
    "granos_enteros":
        "Head rice (%)",

    "granos_quebrados":
        "Broken rice (%)",

    "granos_centro_blanco":
        "Chalky grains (%)",

    "n_granos_vano":
        "Number of unfilled grains per panicle",

    "n_granos_negro":
        "Number of black grains per panicle",

    "n_granos_lleno":
        "Number of filled grains per panicle"

}

# =====================================================
# FUNCIÓN LETRAS TUKEY
# =====================================================

def tukey_letters(
    data,
    var,
    group_col="Localidad",
    alpha=0.05
):

    summary = (
        data.groupby(group_col)[var]
        .mean()
        .sort_values(ascending=False)
    )

    groups = summary.index.tolist()

    tukey = pairwise_tukeyhsd(
        endog=data[var],
        groups=data[group_col],
        alpha=alpha
    )

    tukey_df = pd.DataFrame(
        data=tukey._results_table.data[1:],
        columns=tukey._results_table.data[0]
    )

    sig = pd.DataFrame(
        False,
        index=groups,
        columns=groups
    )

    for _, row in tukey_df.iterrows():

        g1 = row["group1"]
        g2 = row["group2"]

        sig.loc[g1, g2] = bool(row["reject"])
        sig.loc[g2, g1] = bool(row["reject"])

    letters = list("abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz")

    letters_dict = {
        g: "" for g in groups
    }

    for letter in letters:

        assigned = []

        for g in groups:

            compatible = True

            for a in assigned:

                if sig.loc[g, a]:
                    compatible = False
                    break

            if compatible and letters_dict[g] == "":
                assigned.append(g)

        for g in assigned:
            letters_dict[g] += letter

        if all(
            letters_dict[g] != ""
            for g in groups
        ):
            break

    return letters_dict

# =====================================================
# MEDIA Y SD POR LOCALIDAD
# =====================================================

mean_df = (
    df.groupby("Localidad")[variables]
    .mean()
)

std_df = (
    df.groupby("Localidad")[variables]
    .std()
)

# =====================================================
# TABLA FINAL
# =====================================================

summary = pd.DataFrame(
    index=variables,
    columns=mean_df.index,
    dtype="object"
)

for var in variables:

    letters_dict = tukey_letters(
        df,
        var,
        group_col="Localidad"
    )

    for loc in mean_df.index:

        mean_val = mean_df.loc[loc, var]
        std_val = std_df.loc[loc, var]

        letter = letters_dict[loc]

        summary.loc[var, loc] = (
            f"{mean_val:.2f} ± "
            f"{std_val:.2f} "
            f"{letter}"
        )

# =====================================================
# RENOMBRAR VARIABLES
# =====================================================

summary.index = [
    rename_vars[v]
    for v in summary.index
]

# =====================================================
# MOSTRAR
# =====================================================

display(summary)
Localidad E.E.A. El Chira Ignacio Escudero Viviate
Grain yield (t ha⁻¹) 11.64 ± 1.65 a 10.84 ± 1.42 a 11.85 ± 0.55 a
Water-use efficiency (kg m⁻³) 0.80 ± 0.14 a 0.74 ± 0.11 a 0.81 ± 0.08 a
Plant height (cm) 89.96 ± 3.74 a 85.05 ± 4.10 b 88.27 ± 3.76 a
Grain width (mm) 2.32 ± 0.15 b 2.45 ± 0.05 a 2.42 ± 0.03 a
Grain length (mm) 9.08 ± 0.43 b 10.24 ± 0.13 a 9.98 ± 0.12 a
Number of tillers per hill 27.22 ± 3.14 c 37.66 ± 4.36 a 32.27 ± 1.84 b
Panicle length (cm) 23.21 ± 0.96 a 23.58 ± 0.53 a 23.24 ± 0.42 a
Number of panicles per m² 26.32 ± 3.06 c 37.50 ± 4.37 a 32.07 ± 1.81 b
Head rice (%) 62.37 ± 3.04 a 62.49 ± 2.70 a 52.95 ± 9.64 b
Broken rice (%) 7.33 ± 2.42 b 5.35 ± 1.84 b 17.07 ± 8.72 a
Chalky grains (%) 17.38 ± 8.63 a 15.50 ± 5.04 a 7.42 ± 4.66 b
Number of unfilled grains per panicle 7.17 ± 4.01 b 20.75 ± 8.59 a 7.92 ± 4.64 b
Number of black grains per panicle 8.29 ± 3.41 a 5.42 ± 2.71 b 5.25 ± 4.20 b
Number of filled grains per panicle 139.96 ± 27.39 a 125.00 ± 22.97 a 143.50 ± 13.83 a
